reasoning: The control SC-12(4) focuses on cryptographic key establishment and management, specifically related to PKI certificates. In a Kubernetes context, this translates to ensuring that TLS certificates used for securing communication (such as those for etcd, Ingress controllers, and Secrets) are rotated regularly to maintain security. These checks ensure that certificates are not expired and are updated periodically, similar to cloud KMS key rotation.
title: Cryptographic Key Establishment And Management - Cryptographic key establishment and management | pki certificates [withdrawn
